Showroom About Us Q&A

151 — Power Reclining Collection

A different kind of sectional from our other lines — power-reclining seats with a built-in wireless charging pad on the arm. Every setup here is custom-built to order, so there's no fixed catalog to browse. Tell us your space and color, and we'll help you put together the exact piece.

Custom order only — message to check current availability
Browse our other styles:
120 — Slipcover Lounge 121 — Tailored Cloud 140 — Grand Lounge 141 — Corduroy Cloud 142 — Studio Classic

Built To Order, Not Off The Shelf

Unlike our 121, 141, 140, 120, and 142 lines, we don't keep a running "in stock / out of stock" count for 151 — it comes together too many different ways to list as a fixed catalog. Instead, message us with the shape and color you're after and we'll tell you honestly what's realistic right now, whether that's from pieces we already have on hand or something we can source for you.

🔌

Power Reclining

Push-button power recline built into the seating, not a manual lever.

🔋

Built-In Charging

A wireless charging pad and USB port right on the arm — no cords hanging off the couch.

🧩

Fully Custom Layout

Corner, armless, and reclining pieces mixed to fit your room — not a handful of fixed presets.

💬

Message To Confirm

Colors and pieces on hand shift constantly — we'll confirm exactly what's available when you reach out.
